subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come from the heaven of certitude is verily the Dawning-Place of His signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من سماء الایقان انه هو مشرق آیاته
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @proclamation to the people of the world, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
